title: Long Occlusion Tracking — Warehouse Container
description: SECURITY BREACH: A high-risk target was observed entering a large shipping container in the warehouse. The subject will be occluded for an extended period (15+ frames). The agent must track the target's entry point, predict exit vectors, switch cameras to re-acquire the target on emergence, and escalate.

frames.description: Warehouse loading dock. A person in dark clothing moving rapidly toward a large shipping container in the bottom-right quadrant.
Warehouse loading dock. The person has entered the shipping container. Only their arm is visible at the container doorway on the right side.
Warehouse loading dock. Container door is slightly ajar. No person visible. Subject is fully inside the container — occlusion phase begins.
Warehouse interior (rear exit). Empty corridor. Motion sensor log shows no recent triggers.
Warehouse interior (rear exit). TARGET RE-ACQUIRED: Subject observed exiting container via rear hatch, carrying equipment. Persistence verified.
Warehouse interior (rear exit). Subject moving toward emergency exit with stolen equipment. High urgency.
